title: Split Python and Rust release flows by tag namespace
description: Implement best-practice release model: Python semantic-release updates Python files only; release workflow routes jobs by tag namespace (kanbus-py-* vs kanbus-rust-*), preventing Cargo.lock drift from Python releases.
creator: derek.norrbom

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implemented best-practice split release model: removed rust/Cargo.toml from python semantic-release version_toml, added explicit tag routing in release.yml (push tags: kanbus-py-* and kanbus-rust-*), gated pypi-release to python tags/manual non-rust_only, and gated rust-crate to rust tags/manual rust_only with robust version parsing for kanbus-rust-* tags. Local validation: release.yml YAML parses; semantic_release.version_toml now python-only.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Investigated PR #128 CI run 23555141629 immediate failures. Root cause: pull_request builds run against merge commit with base main, and main contains semantic-release bump commit (c49839c) updating rust/Cargo.toml to 0.18.0 without Cargo.lock update. --locked Rust checks fail immediately. Remediation applied on develop: synced python/pyproject.toml + rust/Cargo.toml to 0.18.0 and regenerated rust/Cargo.lock. Local validation: cargo package --locked --list finds embedded asset; KANBUS_CUCUMBER_ONLY_CONSOLE=1 cargo test --locked --test cucumber passes (58 scenarios).

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Aligning with prior release-please behavior: add semantic-release post-step to create/push companion kanbus-rust-{version} tag whenever kanbus-py release succeeds, so Rust release pipeline runs automatically and release history stays dual-component.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implemented compatibility behavior to match prior release-please dual-component releases: semantic-release now creates/pushes companion kanbus-rust-{version} tag after a successful kanbus-py release (idempotent if tag exists). This re-enables automatic Rust release workflow runs without re-coupling python semantic-release version_toml to rust/Cargo.toml.
